question: Based on the map, which of the following statements about the countries shown is most accurate?

options.A: Australia has one of the highest average unemployment rates among the highlighted countries.
options.B: South Africa has one of the lowest average unemployment rates among the highlighted countries.
options.C: Brazil has no unemployment data reported on the map.
options.D: India has a lower average unemployment rate than South Korea.

explanation: At least one of the labelled regions appears grey, indicating missing data rather than a true zero or low value. Because we do not know that region's value, we cannot safely say which labelled region truly has the lowest value.
